end local function w(w)return a[w-(-116388-(-120223))]end do local w=type local n=table.concat local e=table.insert local S=string.len local H=a local y=string.sub local M=math.floor local return(function(a,e,S,H,y,M,E,l,L,Q,J,h,W,c,D,b,n,r,p,i,Y,f,V,z,u)Q,n,b,W,V,c,Y,z,r,L,p,u,i,f,l,h,J,D=function(a,w)local e=i(w)local S=function(...)return n(a,{...},w,e)end return S
